  FreeBSD ports repository

  Log:
  Update to 0.9
  
  Brush up Makefile:
  - Use PORTEXAMPLES (and honor NOPORTEXAMPLES)
  - Remove obsolete constructs and simplify some expressions
  - use LOCALBASE instead of PREFIX where appropriate

  Submitted by:   maintainer
